summary: Iteration 128: RLHF BEO Review Module - All 25 backend tests passed. Chef Gio RLHF module fully functional with queue, review, submit, training-data, and accuracy endpoints.

verified_features.GET_api_chef_gio_beo_review_beo_id: ✓ Returns BEO with 7 echoai_decisions (guest_count, room_assignment, menu_composition, timing, staffing, financial, equipment)
verified_features.echoai_decisions_structure: ✓ Each decision has echoai_reasoning, echoai_recommendation, confidence (0-1), status
verified_features.POST_api_chef_gio_beo_review_submit: ✓ Accepts decisions with status (approved/corrected/flagged), returns review summary
verified_features.corrections_auto_add_to_knowledge_base: ✓ Corrections added to gio_knowledge for immediate use
verified_features.GET_api_chef_gio_review_training_data: ✓ Returns 4 RLHF corrections with categories (guest_count: 2, equipment: 1, financial: 1)
verified_features.beo_changelog_updated: ✓ Chef review submission adds entry to BEO changelog
verified_features.review_status_tracking: ✓ Queue shows correct review_status for reviewed BEOs

seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data (50 BEOs, existing reviews)
context_for_next_testing_agent: RLHF BEO Review Module fully functional. Routes use /api/chef-gio prefix. Training data and accuracy endpoints are at /review-training-data and /review-accuracy (not under /beo-review/ to avoid route collision with {beo_id} param). 7 decision categories generated per BEO. Corrections auto-add to gio_knowledge for immediate AI use. Accuracy currently at 93.9% (improving trend).
